sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me first check the exact positions and think about the goal
# Blue circle at rows 23-31, cols 29-37 (center ~27, 33)
# Magenta squares:
# (29-30, 26-27) - left of blue circle
# (35-36, 16-17) - southwest of blue circle
# (54-55, 45-46) - southeast of blue circle
# (56-57, 15-16) - southwest of blue circle

# Let me try clicking on the blue circle center to see if something happens
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 27, 'col': 33}])
print(f"Click blue circle: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}, gameplay_changed={last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check if anything changed
after = current_frame.segmentation
m_positions = []
for n in after['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] == 4:
        b = n['boundary']
        r = (min([p[0] for p in b]), max([p[0] for p in b]), min([p[1] for p in b]), max([p[1] for p in b]))
        m_positions.append(r)
print(f"Magenta positions: {sorted(m_positions)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
